title: NCCBM – Office Assistant, Manager and More – 26 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NCCBM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 26 Office Assistant, Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: NCCBM Recruitment 2026: 26 Office Assistant, Manager and More vacancies. Apply Offline from 15 May to 04 June 2026 at ojas.gujarat.gov.in. Candidates with B.A, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, M.Sc, M.Com Can Apply Offline. The candidate shall apply Offline through NCCBM website, ncbindia.com.
basic_details.organization_name: National Council for Cement and Building Materials (NCB)

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from the date of publication in Employment News

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech / M.Sc. / PhD in relevant discipline with minimum 60% marks as per post requirement

selection_process: Screening + Trade/Skill Test / Written Examination / Personal Discussion
how_to_apply: Candidates should download the application form from the NCB website and send the duly filled application along with all required self-attested documents by post to the given address before the last date.
Last Date for Receipt of Applications: 21 days from the date of publication of the advertisement (first day of the week) of publication in the Employment News.

The candidates are requested to download application form (available at NCB website) and submit the same duly filled with recent passport size photograph (2 nos.) giving all details as mentioned in point no. 12 along with self-attested documents copies as mentioned this advertisement to The Director General, National Council for Cement and Building Materials, 34 KM Stone, Delhi Mathura Road, (NH-2), Ballabgarh, Haryana, 121004. Applications through email will not be accepted.
Application once made will not allowed to be withdrawn and fees once paid will neither be refunded nor can be held for any other recruitment or selection process.
seo_tags: National Council for Cement and Building Materials Office Assistant
